title: ECU Clone — BMW E60 525d
description: Customer brought a waterlogged ECU from a BMW E60 525d. The original unit was beyond repair due to corrosion on the main processor board. We performed a full chip-level data extraction from the damaged EEPROM and Flash memory, then transferred all data to a donor ECU. No dealer re-coding was required. Car started and ran perfectly on first attempt.
image_alt: ECU cloning BMW E60 525d engine control unit chip level repair Riga
meta_description: Full ECU clone for BMW E60 525d with waterlogged unit. Chip-level data extraction and transfer to donor ECU. No dealer coding required. AKEI, Riga.
